title: cichorium rhagadiolus
intro: Cichorium rhagadiolus, also known as the root of the Spanish blue thistle, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cichorium rhagadiolus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in capsule or tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties.
